name: Fulfillment Chaos Detection Guardian
description: Site Reliability Guardian to detect chaos-induced failures in fulfillment Kafka consumer. Triggers auto-remediation workflow when SLO is breached due to QueryTimeoutException and message processing failures.

_workflow_trigger.description: This guardian should trigger a Dynatrace Workflow when validation fails
workflow_actions: Check if chaos mode is active (FAILURE_RATE env var exists)
Send Slack notification with guardian results
Execute remediation: kubectl set env deployment/fulfillment FAILURE_RATE- SLOWDOWN_RATE- -n fabrik-*
Wait 2 minutes for metrics to stabilize

_api_notes: Create via Dynatrace UI: Settings > Cloud Automation > Site Reliability Guardian
Or use API: POST /api/v2/settings/objects with schemaId = builtin:site-reliability-guardian
